persona_notes: The app operates in the field sales and industrial inventory space. It requires a Command Center aesthetic—dense, tactical, and highly legible outdoors. We are discarding muddy gradients and overly soft shadows. Instead, we use sharp 1px borders, high-contrast text, and a rigid, reliable layout system.

typography.strategy: The user mandated Inter. To avoid visual monotony, we will use extreme weight contrasts: font-black for numbers/stats, font-light for large headings, and JetBrains Mono for all data tables, analytics labels, and IDs to reinforce the 'industrial/technical' aesthetic.

sizes.label: text-xs tracking-[0.1em] uppercase font-medium
sizes.data_stat: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-mono font-bold tracking-tight text-white

admin_portal.structure: Fixed dark navy sidebar (#1a1a2e) with an app background of deep void (#0a0a12). Top header should have a crystal glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0a0a12]/80 border-b border-[#2d2d44]).
admin_portal.dashboard_grid: Dense Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6). Cards must stretch to fill heights. No jagged bottoms.

sales_mobile_portal.structure: Mobile-first view. Hide sidebar. Bottom navigation fixed to the bottom with 4-5 core actions (Home, Visits, Quotations, Expenses).
sales_mobile_portal.ergonomics: Large tap targets (min h-14). The primary action (e.g., GPS Check-in) should be an oversized floating action button (FAB) or a massive button in the center of the screen using the accent color (#e94560).
sales_mobile_portal.nav_styling: Bottom nav should use high-end glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#1a1a2e]/90 border-t border-white/10) to save screen real estate.

public_catalogue.structure: Hero section with background image, dark overlay (bg-[#0a0a12]/70). Followed by a Bento grid layout for shapes/dies catalogue. Generous padding (py-24, py-32).
public_catalogue.alignment: Left-aligned typography for authoritative, editorial feel. Never center-everything.

cards.style: Flat, 1px solid border (#2d2d44), no drop shadows by default. Background #1a1a2e. Hover state lifts slightly (-translate-y-1) and sharpens border to #e94560/50.

buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2d2d44] text-white hover:bg-[#252542] transition-all

inputs_and_forms.style: Shadcn input structure. Background #0a0a12 (darker than surface), border #2d2d44. Focus ring MUST be ring-[#e94560] ring-offset-0.
inputs_and_forms.labels: Use the 'label' typography style (uppercase, tracking-wide, text-xs, text-[#a0a0b0]).

charts.styling: Dark backgrounds, invisible grid lines (or very faint #2d2d44), custom tooltips with flat backgrounds and 1px border.

tables.style: Shadcn table. Header row uses text-xs uppercase text-[#a0a0b0]. Rows have border-b border-[#2d2d44]. Hover state on rows bg-[#252542].

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Fast and precise. transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly change state. Text must brighten (text-[#a0a0b0] to text-white), borders must illuminate.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-in for dashboard cards and list items. (translate-y-4 opacity-0 to translate-y-0 opacity-100).

public_hero_bg.description: Abstract 3D composition of industrial metallic shapes floating in a dark navy blue environment with coral red lighting. Use as the Hero Background in the Public Catalogue Page with a bg-[#0a0a12]/70 overlay.

feature_banner.description: Close up of precision engineered metal parts illuminated by a warm neon coral red light. Use for empty states, login page split-screen backgrounds, or Admin package master banners.

warehouse_stock_1.description: Various metal pipes and tubes stacked together. Use as a thumbnail placeholder for Package Master or Inventory Stock items.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over the #1a1a2e background meets a 4.5:1 ratio. Muted text must not go below #a0a0b0.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: Every button, input, tab, and navigation link MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='admin-sidebar-inventory-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: FORCE DARK MODE: The entire app is natively dark theme. Set the html/body to have class 'dark' and background '#0a0a12' and text-white. Do not build a light mode.
Do not use generic gray borders. Use #2d2d44 for all borders to keep the navy tint.
Implement lucide-react for all icons. Use stroke-width=1.5 for a sharper, technical look.

Install and configure shadcn/ui components (cards, inputs, tables, dialogs, dropdowns, forms). Remove rounded-xl/rounded-2xl from shadcn defaults and replace with rounded-md for a sharper industrial look.
Admin Portal: Create a fixed sidebar layout. Sidebar background: #1a1a2e. Main content area background: #0a0a12.
Mobile Portal: Hide the sidebar on mobile. Build a fixed bottom navigation bar (h-16) for Sales Executives containing Home, Visits, Quotes, and Profile.
Use JetBrains Mono (or standard monospace if unavailable) for all numbers, IDs, and metrics to emphasize the data-heavy Command Center aesthetic.

For the Public Catalogue, build a marketing-style page using the `public_hero_bg` image for the hero section, applying a heavy dark overlay to ensure text legibility. Then build a bento grid for the shape selection.
